creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Updating japanese perl5 ports (${PORTSDIR}/japanese/perl5)
This update is, ja-perl-5.004.01 => ja-perl-5.004.04.

And new maintainer of this ports is  shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp (Shigeyuki FUKUSHIMA).
This update is admitted by the Old maintainer of this ports, hikura@kaisei.org.

Thank you.
